failure_summary.primary_blocker: dev ablation failed closed after strict SMQE claim verification

scoreboard.reason: No frozen holdout head-to-head was run because the dev ablation gate failed closed.

dev_probe.note: Diagnostic dev probe only; not release evidence.

limitations: Frozen holdout head-to-head was not run.
Snap-back audit was not run for a holdout artifact.
Comparator evidence for Chronos, Mastra, ByteRover, and Hindsight was not gathered.
claim_scope.reason: Dominance/SOTA wording is disallowed for this run because the dev ablation gate failed and no frozen holdout head-to-head was executed.
